name: BlueJammer-V2 — ESP32 engine [LAB-ONLY / illegal to operate]
description: EmenstaNougat/BlueJammer-V2 ESP32-WROOM-32U jamming engine (drives up to 4x nRF24L01+, 128x64 OLED). *** LAB-ONLY / ILLEGAL TO OPERATE (FCC 47 U.S.C. 333). *** Cyber Controller FLASHES the precompiled image and reads telemetry for study only — it adds no jamming capability and exposes NO operate/transmit control (the device's only TX triggers are its physical button + the BW16-hosted web UI, neither driven by CC).

firmware_urls.note: Closed-source/precompiled — pinned v0.2 bins fetched from the GitHub Release at flash time, never vendored. Fetched + SHA-256-verified by flash_core.BlueJammerEsp32Profile.

note: esptool offsets bootloader@0x1000 / partitions@0x8000 / app@0x10000, with NO boot_app0 @0xE000 (the upstream RUN_THIS.bat omits it). Wire up to 4x nRF24L01+ on the fixed pins with a 10uF cap per module VCC/GND (brownout fix). CC flashes + reads telemetry only — it never operates the transmitter.
